title: Construction of simplicial complexes with prescribed degree-size sequences
title_zh: 具有规定度大小序列的单纯复形的构造
comment: 6 pages, 4 figures; 3-page supplemental material. Code implementing our methods is available at https://github.com/junipertcy/simplicial-test (Python, pip installable). Read the Docs at https://docs.netscied.tw/simplicial-test/index.html v2: revised and accepted at Phys. Rev. E
comments: 6 pages, 4 figures; 3-page supplemental material. Code implementing our methods is available at https://github.com/junipertcy/simplicial-test (Python, pip installable). Read the Docs at https://docs.netscied.tw/simplicial-test/index.html v2: revised and accepted at Phys. Rev. E
abstract: We study the realizability of simplicial complexes with a given pair of integer sequences, representing the node degree distribution and the facet size distribution, respectively. While the $s$-uniform variant of the problem is $\mathsf{NP}$-complete when $s \geq 3$, we identify two populations of input sequences, most of which can be solved in polynomial time using a recursive algorithm that we contribute. Combining with a sampler for the simplicial configuration model [J.-G. Young $\textit{et al.}$, Phys. Rev. E $\textbf{96}$, 032312 (2017)], we facilitate the efficient sampling of simplicial ensembles from arbitrary degree and size distributions. We find that, contrary to expectations based on dyadic networks, increasing the nodes' degrees reduces the number of loops in simplicial complexes. Our work unveils a fundamental constraint on the degree-size sequences and sheds light on further analysis of higher-order phenomena based on local structures.

abstract_zh: 我们研究了具有给定整数序列对的单纯复形的可实现性，分别表示节点度分布和面大小分布。虽然问题的 $s$ 统一变体在 $s \geq 3$ 时是 $\mathsf{NP}$ 完成的，但我们识别了两个输入序列群体，其中大多数可以使用我们贡献的递归算法在多项式时间内解决。与简单配置模型的采样器结合[J.-G. Young $\textit{et al.}$, Phys. Rev. E $\textbf{96}$, 032312 (2017)]，我们促进了从任意程度和大小分布中对单纯系综的有效采样。我们发现，与基于二元网络的预期相反，增加节点度会减少单纯复形中的循环数量。我们的工作揭示了对度大小序列的基本约束，并为基于局部结构的高阶现象的进一步分析提供了线索。

AI.tldr: 研究如何根据给定的节点度分布和面大小分布构建单纯复形。
AI.motivation: 传统网络分析主要关注二元关系，而单纯复形能描述高阶交互，但其构建条件尚不明确，因此需要研究给定度和面大小序列的可实现性。
AI.method: 提出递归算法解决两类输入序列，并结合采样器高效生成符合任意分布的单纯复形。
AI.result: 发现与二元网络不同，节点度增加会减少单纯复形中的环数量。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了度-大小序列的基本约束，为基于局部结构的高阶现象分析提供基础。

authors_text: Binghao Liu,Yao Ding,Jianbin Jiao,Xiangyang Ji,Qixiang Ye
title: Anti-aliasing Semantic Reconstruction for Few-Shot Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 少镜头语义分割的抗锯齿语义重建
abstract: Encouraging progress in few-shot semantic segmentation has been made by leveraging features learned upon base classes with sufficient training data to represent novel classes with few-shot examples. However, this feature sharing mechanism inevitably causes semantic aliasing between novel classes when they have similar compositions of semantic concepts. In this paper, we reformulate few-shot segmentation as a semantic reconstruction problem, and convert base class features into a series of basis vectors which span a class-level semantic space for novel class reconstruction. By introducing contrastive loss, we maximize the orthogonality of basis vectors while minimizing semantic aliasing between classes. Within the reconstructed representation space, we further suppress interference from other classes by projecting query features to the support vector for precise semantic activation. Our proposed approach, referred to as anti-aliasing semantic reconstruction (ASR), provides a systematic yet interpretable solution for few-shot learning problems. Extensive experiments on PASCAL VOC and MS COCO datasets show that ASR achieves strong results compared with the prior works.
summary: Encouraging progress in few-shot semantic segmentation has been made by leveraging features learned upon base classes with sufficient training data to represent novel classes with few-shot examples. However, this feature sharing mechanism inevitably causes semantic aliasing between novel classes when they have similar compositions of semantic concepts. In this paper, we reformulate few-shot segmentation as a semantic reconstruction problem, and convert base class features into a series of basis vectors which span a class-level semantic space for novel class reconstruction. By introducing contrastive loss, we maximize the orthogonality of basis vectors while minimizing semantic aliasing between classes. Within the reconstructed representation space, we further suppress interference from other classes by projecting query features to the support vector for precise semantic activation. Our proposed approach, referred to as anti-aliasing semantic reconstruction (ASR), provides a systematic yet interpretable solution for few-shot learning problems. Extensive experiments on PASCAL VOC and MS COCO datasets show that ASR achieves strong results compared with the prior works.
abstract_zh: 通过利用在基类上学到的特征和足够的训练数据来表示具有少镜头示例的新类，在少镜头语义分割方面取得了令人鼓舞的进展。然而，当新类具有相似的语义概念组成时，这种特征共享机制不可避免地会导致新类之间的语义别名。在本文中，我们将少镜头分割重新表述为语义重建问题，并将基类特征转换为一系列跨越类级语义空间的基础向量，以进行新的类重建。通过引入对比损失，我们最大化了基向量的正交性，同时最小化了类之间的语义混叠。在重建的表示空间中，我们通过将查询特征投影到支持向量以实现精确的语义激活，进一步抑制来自其他类的干扰。我们提出的方法称为抗锯齿语义重建（ASR），为小样本学习问题提供了系统且可解释的解决方案。在 PASCAL VOC 和 MS COCO 数据集上的大量实验表明，与之前的工作相比，ASR 取得了很好的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种抗混叠语义重建方法（ASR），用于解决少样本语义分割中新型类别间的语义混叠问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过共享基础类特征表示新型类，但当新型类具有相似语义概念时会导致语义混叠，影响分割精度。
AI.method: 将少样本分割重构为语义重建问题，利用对比损失生成正交基向量构建类级语义空间，并通过投影查询特征到支持向量抑制类别干扰。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC和MS COCO数据集上实验表明，ASR方法相比现有工作取得了更强的分割性能。
AI.conclusion: ASR通过系统化的语义空间重建有效缓解了少样本学习中的语义混叠问题，为该领域提供了可解释的解决方案。

search_text: Anti-aliasing Semantic Reconstruction for Few-Shot Semantic Segmentation 少镜头语义分割的抗锯齿语义重建 Encouraging progress in few-shot semantic segmentation has been made by leveraging features learned upon base classes with sufficient training data to represent novel classes with few-shot examples. However, this feature sharing mechanism inevitably causes semantic aliasing between novel classes when they have similar compositions of semantic concepts. In this paper, we reformulate few-shot segmentation as a semantic reconstruction problem, and convert base class features into a series of basis vectors which span a class-level semantic space for novel class reconstruction. By introducing contrastive loss, we maximize the orthogonality of basis vectors while minimizing semantic aliasing between classes. Within the reconstructed representation space, we further suppress interference from other classes by projecting query features to the support vector for precise semantic activation. Our proposed approach, referred to as anti-aliasing semantic reconstruction (ASR), provides a systematic yet interpretable solution for few-shot learning problems. authors_text: Levente J. Klein,Wang Zhou,Conrad M. Albrecht
title: Quantification of Carbon Sequestration in Urban Forests
title_zh: 城市森林碳固存的量化
comment: ef:International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2021) Workshop
comments: ef:International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2021) Workshop
abstract: Vegetation, trees in particular, sequester carbon by absorbing carbon dioxide from the atmosphere. However, the lack of efficient quantification methods of carbon stored in trees renders it difficult to track the process. We present an approach to estimate the carbon storage in trees based on fusing multi-spectral aerial imagery and LiDAR data to identify tree coverage, geometric shape, and tree species -- key attributes to carbon storage quantification. We demonstrate that tree species information and their three-dimensional geometric shapes can be estimated from aerial imagery in order to determine the tree's biomass. Specifically, we estimate a total of $52,000$ tons of carbon sequestered in trees for New York City's borough Manhattan.
summary: Vegetation, trees in particular, sequester carbon by absorbing carbon dioxide from the atmosphere. However, the lack of efficient quantification methods of carbon stored in trees renders it difficult to track the process. We present an approach to estimate the carbon storage in trees based on fusing multi-spectral aerial imagery and LiDAR data to identify tree coverage, geometric shape, and tree species -- key attributes to carbon storage quantification. We demonstrate that tree species information and their three-dimensional geometric shapes can be estimated from aerial imagery in order to determine the tree's biomass. Specifically, we estimate a total of $52,000$ tons of carbon sequestered in trees for New York City's borough Manhattan.
abstract_zh: 植被，特别是树木，通过吸收大气中的二氧化碳来固碳。然而，由于缺乏有效的树木储存碳量化方法，使得追踪这一过程变得困难。我们提出了一种估计树木碳储存的方法，该方法基于融合多光谱航空图像和激光雷达数据来识别树木覆盖范围、几何形状和树种——碳储存量化的关键属性。我们证明，可以从航空图像中估计树种信息及其三维几何形状，以确定树木的生物量。具体来说，我们估计纽约市曼哈顿区的树木固碳总量为 52,000 美元吨。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合多光谱航拍图像和LiDAR数据的方法，用于量化城市树木的碳储量。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以高效量化树木碳储量，阻碍了碳封存过程的追踪与管理。
AI.method: 融合多光谱航拍图像与LiDAR数据，识别树木覆盖范围、三维几何形态及树种，进而估算生物量与碳储量。
AI.result: 估算纽约市曼哈顿区树木总固碳量为52,000吨。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过整合遥感数据与三维建模技术，为城市森林碳储量量化提供了可行方案，助力城市碳管理决策。

Specifically, we estimate a total of $52,000$ tons of carbon sequestered in trees for New York City's borough Manhattan. 植被，特别是树木，通过吸收大气中的二氧化碳来固碳。然而，由于缺乏有效的树木储存碳量化方法，使得追踪这一过程变得困难。我们提出了一种估计树木碳储存的方法，该方法基于融合多光谱航空图像和激光雷达数据来识别树木覆盖范围、几何形状和树种——碳储存量化的关键属性。我们证明，可以从航空图像中估计树种信息及其三维几何形状，以确定树木的生物量。具体来说，我们估计纽约市曼哈顿区的树木固碳总量为 52,000 美元吨。 本文提出了一种结合多光谱航拍图像和LiDAR数据的方法，用于量化城市树木的碳储量。 Levente J. Klein,Wang Zhou,Conrad M. Albrecht cs.CV,eess.IV

title: Dual Normalization Multitasking for Audio-Visual Sounding Object Localization
title_zh: 用于视听探测目标定位的双归一化多任务
comment: 10 pages, 6 figures
comments: 10 pages, 6 figures
abstract: Although several research works have been reported on audio-visual sound source localization in unconstrained videos, no datasets and metrics have been proposed in the literature to quantitatively evaluate its performance. Defining the ground truth for sound source localization is difficult, because the location where the sound is produced is not limited to the range of the source object, but the vibrations propagate and spread through the surrounding objects. Therefore we propose a new concept, Sounding Object, to reduce the ambiguity of the visual location of sound, making it possible to annotate the location of the wide range of sound sources. With newly proposed metrics for quantitative evaluation, we formulate the problem of Audio-Visual Sounding Object Localization (AVSOL). We also created the evaluation dataset (AVSOL-E dataset) by manually annotating the test set of well-known Audio-Visual Event (AVE) dataset. To tackle this new AVSOL problem, we propose a novel multitask training strategy and architecture called Dual Normalization Multitasking (DNM), which aggregates the Audio-Visual Correspondence (AVC) task and the classification task for video events into a single audio-visual similarity map. By efficiently utilize both supervisions by DNM, our proposed architecture significantly outperforms the baseline methods.

By efficiently utilize both supervisions by DNM, our proposed architecture significantly outperforms the baseline methods.
abstract_zh: Although several research works have been reported on audio-visual sound source localization in unconstrained videos, no datasets and metrics have been proposed in the literature to quantitatively evaluate its performance.定义声源定位的基本事实很困难，因为产生声音的位置并不限于源对象的范围，而是振动通过周围的对象传播和传播。因此，我们提出了一个新的概念——Sounding Object，以减少声音视觉位置的模糊性，使得注释各种声源的位置成为可能。通过新提出的定量评估指标，我们提出了视听探测对象定位（AVSOL）问题。我们还通过手动注释著名的视听事件（AVE）数据集的测试集来创建评估数据集（AVSOL-E数据集）。 To tackle this new AVSOL problem, we propose a novel multitask training strategy and architecture called Dual Normalization Multitasking (DNM), which aggregates the Audio-Visual Correspondence (AVC) task and the classification task for video events into a single audio-visual similarity map.通过有效利用 DNM 的两种监督，我们提出的架构显着优于基线方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Dual Normalization Multitasking (DNM)的新方法，用于解决音频-视觉发声物体定位（AVSOL）问题，并构建了首个评估数据集AVSOL-E。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏量化评估音频-视觉声源定位性能的数据集和指标，且声源位置标注存在歧义，因为声音可能通过周围物体传播。
AI.method: 提出Sounding Object概念减少定位歧义，设计DNM多任务框架，将音频-视觉对应（AVC）任务与视频事件分类任务整合到统一的相似度图中，通过双重归一化机制融合多任务监督信号。
AI.result: 在AVSOL-E数据集上显著优于基线方法，验证了DNM框架在音频-视觉联合定位任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入新概念、指标和数据集，本文为音频-视觉声源定位提供了系统性解决方案，DNM方法证明了多任务学习在该领域的潜力。

authors_text: Tsu-Jui Fu,Xin Eric Wang,William Yang Wang
title: Language-Driven Image Style Transfer
title_zh: 语言驱动的图像风格迁移
comment: ECCV'22
comments: ECCV'22
abstract: Despite having promising results, style transfer, which requires preparing style images in advance, may result in lack of creativity and accessibility. Following human instruction, on the other hand, is the most natural way to perform artistic style transfer that can significantly improve controllability for visual effect applications. We introduce a new task, language-driven artistic style transfer (LDAST), to manipulate the style of a content image, guided by a text. We propose contrastive language visual artist (CLVA) that learns to extract visual semantics from style instructions and accomplish LDAST by the patch-wise style discriminator. The discriminator considers the correlation between language and patches of style images or transferred results to jointly embed style instructions. CLVA further compares contrastive pairs of content images and style instructions to improve the mutual relativeness. The results from the same content image can preserve consistent content structures. Besides, they should present analogous style patterns from style instructions that contain similar visual semantics. The experiments show that our CLVA is effective and achieves superb transferred results on LDAST.
summary: Despite having promising results, style transfer, which requires preparing style images in advance, may result in lack of creativity and accessibility. Following human instruction, on the other hand, is the most natural way to perform artistic style transfer that can significantly improve controllability for visual effect applications. We introduce a new task, language-driven artistic style transfer (LDAST), to manipulate the style of a content image, guided by a text. We propose contrastive language visual artist (CLVA) that learns to extract visual semantics from style instructions and accomplish LDAST by the patch-wise style discriminator. The discriminator considers the correlation between language and patches of style images or transferred results to jointly embed style instructions. CLVA further compares contrastive pairs of content images and style instructions to improve the mutual relativeness. The results from the same content image can preserve consistent content structures. Besides, they should present analogous style patterns from style instructions that contain similar visual semantics. The experiments show that our CLVA is effective and achieves superb transferred results on LDAST.
abstract_zh: 尽管取得了有希望的结果，但风格迁移需要提前准备风格图像，可能会导致缺乏创造力和可访问性。另一方面，遵循人类指令是执行艺术风格迁移的最自然方式，可以显着提高视觉效果应用的可控性。我们引入了一项新任务，即语言驱动的艺术风格迁移（LDAST），以在文本引导下操纵内容图像的风格。我们提出对比语言视觉艺术家（CLVA），它学习从风格指令中提取视觉语义，并通过分块风格鉴别器完成 LDAST。鉴别器考虑语言和风格图像块或传输结果之间的相关性以共同嵌入风格指令。 CLVA 进一步比较内容图像和风格指令的对比对，以提高相互的相关性。来自相同内容图像的结果可以保持一致的内容结构。此外，他们应该从包含相似视觉语义的样式指令中呈现类似的样式模式。实验表明我们的 CLVA 是有效的，并且在 LDAST 上取得了极好的迁移结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于语言驱动的图像风格迁移任务（LDAST），通过文本指令引导内容图像的风格转换。
AI.motivation: 传统风格迁移需预先准备风格图像，导致创造性和可访问性不足。通过人类指令进行艺术风格迁移能显著提升视觉效果的可控性。
AI.method: 提出对比语言视觉艺术家（CLVA）模型，通过提取风格指令的视觉语义，并利用基于块的风格判别器，结合语言与风格图像块或转换结果的相关性进行联合嵌入。
AI.result: 实验表明CLVA在LDAST任务中效果显著，能保持内容结构一致性并呈现相似视觉语义的风格模式。
AI.conclusion: CLVA通过语言与视觉元素的对齐，成功实现了基于语言驱动的图像风格迁移，提升了风格转换的可控性与表现力。

authors_text: Hengduo Li,Zuxuan Wu,Abhinav Shrivastava,Larry S. Davis
title: Rethinking Pseudo Labels for Semi-Supervised Object Detection
title_zh: 重新思考半监督目标检测的伪标签
comment: AAAI 2022
comments: AAAI 2022
abstract: Recent advances in semi-supervised object detection (SSOD) are largely driven by consistency-based pseudo-labeling methods for image classification tasks, producing pseudo labels as supervisory signals. However, when using pseudo labels, there is a lack of consideration in localization precision and amplified class imbalance, both of which are critical for detection tasks. In this paper, we introduce certainty-aware pseudo labels tailored for object detection, which can effectively estimate the classification and localization quality of derived pseudo labels. This is achieved by converting conventional localization as a classification task followed by refinement. Conditioned on classification and localization quality scores, we dynamically adjust the thresholds used to generate pseudo labels and reweight loss functions for each category to alleviate the class imbalance problem. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method improves state-of-the-art SSOD performance by 1-2% AP on COCO and PASCAL VOC while being orthogonal and complementary to most existing methods. In the limited-annotation regime, our approach improves supervised baselines by up to 10% AP using only 1-10% labeled data from COCO.
summary: Recent advances in semi-supervised object detection (SSOD) are largely driven by consistency-based pseudo-labeling methods for image classification tasks, producing pseudo labels as supervisory signals. However, when using pseudo labels, there is a lack of consideration in localization precision and amplified class imbalance, both of which are critical for detection tasks. In this paper, we introduce certainty-aware pseudo labels tailored for object detection, which can effectively estimate the classification and localization quality of derived pseudo labels. This is achieved by converting conventional localization as a classification task followed by refinement. Conditioned on classification and localization quality scores, we dynamically adjust the thresholds used to generate pseudo labels and reweight loss functions for each category to alleviate the class imbalance problem. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method improves state-of-the-art SSOD performance by 1-2% AP on COCO and PASCAL VOC while being orthogonal and complementary to most existing methods. In the limited-annotation regime, our approach improves supervised baselines by up to 10% AP using only 1-10% labeled data from COCO.
abstract_zh: 半监督目标检测（SSOD）的最新进展很大程度上是由用于图像分类任务的基于一致性的伪标签方法驱动的，产生伪标签作为监督信号。然而，当使用伪标签时，缺乏对定位精度和放大的类不平衡的考虑，而这两者对于检测任务来说都是至关重要的。在本文中，我们引入了为目标检测量身定制的确定性感知伪标签，它可以有效地估计派生伪标签的分类和定位质量。这是通过将传统的定位转换为分类任务并随后进行细化来实现的。根据分类和定位质量得分，我们动态调整用于生成每个类别的伪标签和重新权重损失函数的阈值，以缓解类别不平衡问题。大量实验表明，我们的方法在 COCO 和 PASCAL VOC 上将最先进的 SSOD 性能提高了 1-2% AP，同时与大多数现有方法正交和补充。在有限注释机制中，我们的方法仅使用来自 COCO 的 1-10% 标记数据将监督基线提高了高达 10% AP。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对半监督目标检测的确定性伪标签方法，通过优化分类与定位质量估计提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督目标检测方法在生成伪标签时忽视了定位精度与类别不平衡问题，导致检测效果受限。
AI.method: 将传统定位任务转化为分类任务进行优化，基于分类与定位质量得分动态调整伪标签生成阈值，并对损失函数进行类别重加权。
AI.result: 在COCO和PASCAL VOC数据集上，该方法使最新SSOD方法的AP值提升1-2%，在标注数据仅1-10%时超越监督基线10% AP。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入确定性伪标签机制，有效解决了半监督目标检测中的定位精度与类别不平衡问题，且与现有方法具有正交性与互补性。

search_text: Rethinking Pseudo Labels for Semi-Supervised Object Detection 重新思考半监督目标检测的伪标签 Recent advances in semi-supervised object detection (SSOD) are largely driven by consistency-based pseudo-labeling methods for image classification tasks, producing pseudo labels as supervisory signals. However, when using pseudo labels, there is a lack of consideration in localization precision and amplified class imbalance, both of which are critical for detection tasks. In this paper, we introduce certainty-aware pseudo labels tailored for object detection, which can effectively estimate the classification and localization quality of derived pseudo labels. This is achieved by converting conventional localization as a classification task followed by refinement. Conditioned on classification and localization quality scores, we dynamically adjust the thresholds used to generate pseudo labels and reweight loss functions for each category to alleviate the class imbalance problem. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method improves state-of-the-art SSOD performance by 1-2% AP on COCO and PASCAL VOC while being orthogonal and complementary to most existing methods. In the limited-annotation regime, our approach improves supervised baselines by up to 10% AP using only 1-10% labeled data from COCO. 半监督目标检测（SSOD）的最新进展很大程度上是由用于图像分类任务的基于一致性的伪标签方法驱动的，产生伪标签作为监督信号。然而，当使用伪标签时，缺乏对定位精度和放大的类不平衡的考虑，而这两者对于检测任务来说都是至关重要的。在本文中，我们引入了为目标检测量身定制的确定性感知伪标签，它可以有效地估计派生伪标签的分类和定位质量。这是通过将传统的定位转换为分类任务并随后进行细化来实现的。根据分类和定位质量得分，我们动态调整用于生成每个类别的伪标签和重新权重损失函数的阈值，以缓解类别不平衡问题。大量实验表明，我们的方法在 COCO 和 PASCAL VOC 上将最先进的 SSOD 性能提高了 1-2% AP，同时与大多数现有方法正交和补充。在有限注释机制中，我们的方法仅使用来自 COCO 的 1-10% 标记数据将监督基线提高了高达 10% AP。 本文提出一种针对半监督目标检测的确定性伪标签方法，通过优化分类与定位质量估计提升检测性能。 Hengduo Li,Zuxuan Wu,Abhinav Shrivastava,Larry S. Davis cs.CV

title: Parlermonium: A Data-Driven UX Design Evaluation of the Parler Platform
title_zh: Parlermium：Parler 平台的数据驱动用户体验设计评估
abstract: This paper evaluates Parler, the controversial social media platform, from two seemingly orthogonal perspectives: UX design perspective and data science. UX design researchers explore how users react to the interface/content of their social media feeds; Data science researchers analyze the misinformation flow in these feeds to detect alternative narratives and state-sponsored disinformation campaigns. We took a critical look into the intersection of these approaches to understand how Parler's interface itself is conductive to the flow of misinformation and the perception of "free speech" among its audience. Parler drew widespread attention leading up to and after the 2020 U.S. elections as the "alternative" place for free speech, as a reaction to other mainstream social media platform which actively engaged in labeling misinformation with content warnings. Because platforms like Parler are disruptive to the social media landscape, we believe the evaluation uniquely uncovers the platform's conductivity to the spread of misinformation.
summary: This paper evaluates Parler, the controversial social media platform, from two seemingly orthogonal perspectives: UX design perspective and data science. UX design researchers explore how users react to the interface/content of their social media feeds; Data science researchers analyze the misinformation flow in these feeds to detect alternative narratives and state-sponsored disinformation campaigns. We took a critical look into the intersection of these approaches to understand how Parler's interface itself is conductive to the flow of misinformation and the perception of "free speech" among its audience. Parler drew widespread attention leading up to and after the 2020 U.S. elections as the "alternative" place for free speech, as a reaction to other mainstream social media platform which actively engaged in labeling misinformation with content warnings. Because platforms like Parler are disruptive to the social media landscape, we believe the evaluation uniquely uncovers the platform's conductivity to the spread of misinformation.
abstract_zh: 本文从用户体验设计角度和数据科学这两个看似正交的角度对备受争议的社交媒体平台 Parler 进行了评估。用户体验设计研究人员探索用户如何对其社交媒体提要的界面/内容做出反应；数据科学研究人员分析这些源中的错误信息流，以发现替代叙述和国家资助的虚假信息活动。我们对这些方法的交叉点进行了批判性的研究，以了解 Parler 的界面本身如何促进错误信息的流动以及受众对“言论自由”的认知。帕勒在 2020 年美国大选前后作为言论自由的“替代”场所引起了广泛关注，作为对其他主流社交媒体平台积极用内容警告标记错误信息的反应。由于像 Parler 这样的平台对社交媒体格局具有颠覆性，我们相信该评估独特地揭示了该平台对错误信息传播的传导性。

AI.tldr: 本文从用户体验设计和数据科学两个角度评估Parler平台，分析其界面如何促进错误信息传播及用户对'言论自由'的感知。
AI.motivation: Parler作为2020年美国大选期间备受关注的'言论自由'替代平台，其界面设计可能加剧错误信息传播，需评估其对社交媒体格局的颠覆性影响。
AI.method: 结合UX设计分析与数据科学方法，研究用户对界面/内容的反应，并通过信息流分析检测替代叙事及国家支持的虚假信息活动。
AI.result: 发现Parler的界面设计机制与用户对'言论自由'的感知共同促进错误信息扩散，揭示其作为'替代平台'的独特传播特性。
AI.conclusion: 平台设计与信息传播存在紧密关联，需在言论自由与信息准确性间寻求平衡，防止错误信息通过特定界面设计被放大。

authors_text: Travis J. E. Munyer,Daniel Brinkman,Chenyu Huang,Xin Zhong
title: Integrative Use of Computer Vision and Unmanned Aircraft Technologies in Public Inspection: Foreign Object Debris Image Collection
title_zh: 计算机视觉和无人机技术在公共检查中的综合运用：异物碎片图像收集
comment: This paper has been accepted for publication by the 22nd Annual International Conference on Digital Government Research. 7 pages, 1 figure, 1 table
comments: This paper has been accepted for publication by the 22nd Annual International Conference on Digital Government Research. 7 pages, 1 figure, 1 table
abstract: Unmanned Aircraft Systems (UAS) have become an important resource for public service providers and smart cities. The purpose of this study is to expand this research area by integrating computer vision and UAS technology to automate public inspection. As an initial case study for this work, a dataset of common foreign object debris (FOD) is developed to assess the potential of light-weight automated detection. This paper presents the rationale and creation of this dataset. Future iterations of our work will include further technical details analyzing experimental implementation. At a local airport, UAS and portable cameras are used to collect the data contained in the initial version of this dataset. After collecting these videos of FOD, they were split into individual frames and stored as several thousand images. These frames are then annotated following standard computer vision format and stored in a folder-structure that reflects our creation method. The dataset annotations are validated using a custom tool that could be abstracted to fit future applications. Initial detection models were successfully created using the famous You Only Look Once algorithm, which indicates the practicality of the proposed data. Finally, several potential scenarios that could utilize either this dataset or similar methods for other public service are presented.
summary: Unmanned Aircraft Systems (UAS) have become an important resource for public service providers and smart cities. The purpose of this study is to expand this research area by integrating computer vision and UAS technology to automate public inspection. As an initial case study for this work, a dataset of common foreign object debris (FOD) is developed to assess the potential of light-weight automated detection. This paper presents the rationale and creation of this dataset. Future iterations of our work will include further technical details analyzing experimental implementation. At a local airport, UAS and portable cameras are used to collect the data contained in the initial version of this dataset. After collecting these videos of FOD, they were split into individual frames and stored as several thousand images. These frames are then annotated following standard computer vision format and stored in a folder-structure that reflects our creation method. The dataset annotations are validated using a custom tool that could be abstracted to fit future applications. Initial detection models were successfully created using the famous You Only Look Once algorithm, which indicates the practicality of the proposed data. Finally, several potential scenarios that could utilize either this dataset or similar methods for other public service are presented.
abstract_zh: 无人机系统（UAS）已成为公共服务提供商和智慧城市的重要资源。本研究的目的是通过整合计算机视觉和无人机技术来扩展这一研究领域，以实现公共检查的自动化。作为这项工作的初始案例研究，开发了常见异物碎片 (FOD) 数据集来评估轻量级自动检测的潜力。本文介绍了该数据集的基本原理和创建。我们工作的未来迭代将包括分析实验实施的进一步技术细节。在当地机场，无人机和便携式摄像机用于收集该数据集初始版本中包含的数据。收集这些 FOD 视频后，它们被分割成单独的帧并存储为数千张图像。然后，这些帧按照标准计算机视觉格式进行注释，并存储在反映我们创建方法的文件夹结构中。数据集注释使用自定义工具进行验证，该工具可以进行抽象以适应未来的应用程序。使用著名的 You Only Look Once 算法成功创建了初始检测模型，这表明了所提出的数据的实用性。最后，提出了可以利用该数据集或类似方法进行其他公共服务的几种潜在场景。

AI.tldr: 整合无人机与计算机视觉技术，开发用于公共检查的异物碎片图像数据集以实现自动化检测。
AI.motivation: 无人机系统在公共服务中应用广泛，但需进一步整合计算机视觉技术提升自动化检测能力，开发专用数据集以验证可行性。
AI.method: 使用无人机与便携相机在机场收集异物碎片视频数据，分割为图像并标注，采用YOLO算法构建检测模型，通过自定义工具验证标注质量。
AI.result: 成功创建异物碎片数据集并训练出有效检测模型，验证了方法的实用性，提出了数据集在其他公共场景的应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集及方法为公共检查自动化提供了可行方案，后续将完善技术细节并拓展至更多公共服务领域。

ai_content.result: 成功创建异物碎片数据集并训练出有效检测模型，验证了方法的实用性，提出了数据集在其他公共场景的应用潜力。

search_text: Integrative Use of Computer Vision and Unmanned Aircraft Technologies in Public Inspection: Foreign Object Debris Image Collection 计算机视觉和无人机技术在公共检查中的综合运用：异物碎片图像收集 Unmanned Aircraft Systems (UAS) have become an important resource for public service providers and smart cities. The purpose of this study is to expand this research area by integrating computer vision and UAS technology to automate public inspection. As an initial case study for this work, a dataset of common foreign object debris (FOD) is developed to assess the potential of light-weight automated detection. This paper presents the rationale and creation of this dataset. Future iterations of our work will include further technical details analyzing experimental implementation. At a local airport, UAS and portable cameras are used to collect the data contained in the initial version of this dataset. After collecting these videos of FOD, they were split into individual frames and stored as several thousand images. These frames are then annotated following standard computer vision format and stored in a folder-structure that reflects our creation method. The dataset annotations are validated using a custom tool that could be abstracted to fit future applications. Initial detection models were successfully created using the famous You Only Look Once algorithm, which indicates the practicality of the proposed data. Finally, several potential scenarios that could utilize either this dataset or similar methods for other public service are presented. 无人机系统（UAS）已成为公共服务提供商和智慧城市的重要资源。本研究的目的是通过整合计算机视觉和无人机技术来扩展这一研究领域，以实现公共检查的自动化。作为这项工作的初始案例研究，开发了常见异物碎片 (FOD) 数据集来评估轻量级自动检测的潜力。本文介绍了该数据集的基本原理和创建。我们工作的未来迭代将包括分析实验实施的进一步技术细节。在当地机场，无人机和便携式摄像机用于收集该数据集初始版本中包含的数据。收集这些 FOD 视频后，它们被分割成单独的帧并存储为数千张图像。然后，这些帧按照标准计算机视觉格式进行注释，并存储在反映我们创建方法的文件夹结构中。数据集注释使用自定义工具进行验证，该工具可以进行抽象以适应未来的应用程序。使用著名的 You Only Look Once 算法成功创建了初始检测模型，这表明了所提出的数据的实用性。最后，提出了可以利用该数据集或类似方法进行其他公共服务的几种潜在场景。 整合无人机与计算机视觉技术，开发用于公共检查的异物碎片图像数据集以实现自动化检测。 Travis J. E. Munyer,Daniel Brinkman,Chenyu Huang,Xin Zhong cs.CV

title: A Road-map to Robot Task Execution with the Functional Object-Oriented Network
title_zh: 使用功能面向对象网络执行机器人任务的路线图
comment: Ubiquitous Robots 2021 Submission -- 4 pages
comments: Ubiquitous Robots 2021 Submission -- 4 pages
abstract: Following work on joint object-action representations, the functional object-oriented network (FOON) was introduced as a knowledge graph representation for robots. Taking the form of a bipartite graph, a FOON contains symbolic or high-level information that would be pertinent to a robot's understanding of its environment and tasks in a way that mirrors human understanding of actions. In this work, we outline a road-map for future development of FOON and its application in robotic systems for task planning as well as knowledge acquisition from demonstration. We propose preliminary ideas to show how a FOON can be created in a real-world scenario with a robot and human teacher in a way that can jointly augment existing knowledge in a FOON and teach a robot the skills it needs to replicate the demonstrated actions and solve a given manipulation problem.
summary: Following work on joint object-action representations, the functional object-oriented network (FOON) was introduced as a knowledge graph representation for robots. Taking the form of a bipartite graph, a FOON contains symbolic or high-level information that would be pertinent to a robot's understanding of its environment and tasks in a way that mirrors human understanding of actions. In this work, we outline a road-map for future development of FOON and its application in robotic systems for task planning as well as knowledge acquisition from demonstration. We propose preliminary ideas to show how a FOON can be created in a real-world scenario with a robot and human teacher in a way that can jointly augment existing knowledge in a FOON and teach a robot the skills it needs to replicate the demonstrated actions and solve a given manipulation problem.
abstract_zh: 在联合对象动作表示的研究之后，功能性面向对象网络（FOON）被引入作为机器人的知识图表示。 FOON 采用二部图的形式，包含符号或高级信息，这些信息与机器人对其环境和任务的理解相关，以反映人类对行为的理解。在这项工作中，我们概述了 FOON 的未来发展及其在机器人系统中的应用，以进行任务规划以及从演示中获取知识。我们提出了初步想法，以展示如何在现实场景中由机器人和人类教师创建 FOON，从而共同增强 FOON 中的现有知识，并教授机器人复制演示动作和解决给定操作问题所需的技能。

AI.tldr: 提出功能对象导向网络（FOON）的未来发展方向及其在机器人任务规划和知识获取中的应用路线图
AI.motivation: 现有方法在联合对象-动作表示基础上，需更有效知识表示方法以提升机器人任务执行能力
AI.method: 通过机器人与人类教师协作，在现实场景中构建FOON，实现知识增强与技能教学的联合
AI.result: 提出初步构想，展示FOON在真实场景中的创建方法及知识增强与技能教学的联合实现
AI.conclusion: FOON为机器人任务执行提供新框架，未来需进一步研究其应用

authors_text: Lin Yan,Talha Bin Masood,Raghavendra Sridharamurthy,Farhan Rasheed,Vijay Natarajan,Ingrid Hotz,Bei Wang
title: Scalar Field Comparison with Topological Descriptors: Properties and Applications for Scientific Visualization
title_zh: 标量场与拓扑描述符的比较：科学可视化的属性和应用
abstract: In topological data analysis and visualization, topological descriptors such as persistence diagrams, merge trees, contour trees, Reeb graphs, and Morse-Smale complexes play an essential role in capturing the shape of scalar field data. We present a state-of-the-art report on scalar field comparison using topological descriptors. We provide a taxonomy of existing approaches based on visualization tasks associated with three categories of data: single fields, time-varying fields, and ensembles. These tasks include symmetry detection, periodicity detection, key event/feature detection, feature tracking, clustering, and structure statistics. Our main contributions include the formulation of a set of desirable mathematical and computational properties of comparative measures, and the classification of visualization tasks and applications that are enabled by these measures.
summary: In topological data analysis and visualization, topological descriptors such as persistence diagrams, merge trees, contour trees, Reeb graphs, and Morse-Smale complexes play an essential role in capturing the shape of scalar field data. We present a state-of-the-art report on scalar field comparison using topological descriptors. We provide a taxonomy of existing approaches based on visualization tasks associated with three categories of data: single fields, time-varying fields, and ensembles. These tasks include symmetry detection, periodicity detection, key event/feature detection, feature tracking, clustering, and structure statistics. Our main contributions include the formulation of a set of desirable mathematical and computational properties of comparative measures, and the classification of visualization tasks and applications that are enabled by these measures.
abstract_zh: 在拓扑数据分析和可视化中，持久图、合并树、等值线树、Reeb 图和 Morse-Smale 复合体等拓扑描述符在捕获标量场数据的形状方面发挥着重要作用。我们提出了使用拓扑描述符进行标量场比较的最先进报告。我们基于与三类数据相关的可视化任务提供了现有方法的分类：单一字段、时变字段和集合。这些任务包括对称性检测、周期性检测、关键事件/特征检测、特征跟踪、聚类和结构统计。我们的主要贡献包括制定一组理想的比较度量的数学和计算属性，以及对这些度量所支持的可视化任务和应用程序进行分类。

AI.tldr: 综述使用拓扑描述符进行标量场比较的最新方法，并分类不同数据类型下的可视化任务
AI.motivation: 拓扑描述符在科学可视化中至关重要，但现有比较方法缺乏系统分类和数学属性分析，需建立统一框架指导应用
AI.method: 基于三种数据类型（单字段、时变字段、集合）的可视化任务分类，提出比较度量的数学和计算属性
AI.result: 系统总结了不同任务下的应用方法，为后续研究提供分类框架和数学属性参考
AI.conclusion: 该分类和属性分析有效提升了标量场数据的比较分析能力，推动科学可视化技术发展

title: Strobe: An Acceleration Meta-algorithm for Optimizing Robot Paths using Concurrent Interleaved Sub-Epoch Pods
title_zh: Strobe：一种使用并发交错子纪元 Pod 优化机器人路径的加速元算法
abstract: In this paper, we present a meta-algorithm intended to accelerate many existing path optimization algorithms. The central idea of our work is to strategically break up a waypoint path into consecutive groupings called "pods," then optimize over various pods concurrently using parallel processing. Each pod is assigned a color, either blue or red, and the path is divided in such a way that adjacent pods of the same color have an appropriate buffer of the opposite color between them, reducing the risk of interference between concurrent computations. We present a path splitting algorithm to create blue and red pod groupings and detail steps for a meta-algorithm that optimizes over these pods in parallel. We assessed how our method works on a testbed of simulated path optimization scenarios using various optimization tasks and characterize how it scales with additional threads. We also compared our meta-algorithm on these tasks to other parallelization schemes. Our results show that our method more effectively utilizes concurrency compared to the alternatives, both in terms of speed and optimization quality.
summary: In this paper, we present a meta-algorithm intended to accelerate many existing path optimization algorithms. The central idea of our work is to strategically break up a waypoint path into consecutive groupings called "pods," then optimize over various pods concurrently using parallel processing. Each pod is assigned a color, either blue or red, and the path is divided in such a way that adjacent pods of the same color have an appropriate buffer of the opposite color between them, reducing the risk of interference between concurrent computations. We present a path splitting algorithm to create blue and red pod groupings and detail steps for a meta-algorithm that optimizes over these pods in parallel. We assessed how our method works on a testbed of simulated path optimization scenarios using various optimization tasks and characterize how it scales with additional threads. We also compared our meta-algorithm on these tasks to other parallelization schemes. Our results show that our method more effectively utilizes concurrency compared to the alternatives, both in terms of speed and optimization quality.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种元算法，旨在加速许多现有的路径优化算法。我们工作的中心思想是战略性地将路径点路径分解为称为“吊舱”的连续分组，然后使用并行处理同时优化各个吊舱。每个 Pod 都分配有一种颜色（蓝色或红色），并且路径的划分方式使得相同颜色的相邻 Pod 在它们之间具有相反颜色的适当缓冲区，从而降低并发计算之间干扰的风险。我们提出了一种路径分割算法来创建蓝色和红色 Pod 分组，并详细介绍了并行优化这些 Pod 的元算法的步骤。我们使用各种优化任务评估了我们的方法如何在模拟路径优化场景的测试台上工作，并描述了它如何通过附加线程进行扩展。我们还将这些任务的元算法与其他并行化方案进行了比较。我们的结果表明，与其他方法相比，我们的方法在速度和优化质量方面都更有效地利用了并发性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种元算法Strobe，通过将机器人路径分割为蓝红交替的子段（pods）并行优化，提升路径优化效率。
AI.motivation: 现有路径优化算法在并发计算时存在效率与质量平衡问题，需更高效的并行化方案降低干扰并提升性能。
AI.method: 将路径拆分为蓝红交替的缓冲子段（pods），通过并行处理不同颜色子段减少计算干扰，并设计路径分割算法与元算法框架实现并发优化。
AI.result: 实验表明，Strobe在多线程环境下相比其他并行方案，速度与优化质量均有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: Strobe通过颜色缓冲机制有效利用并发计算，为机器人路径优化提供了更高效且稳定的元算法框架。

search_text: Strobe: An Acceleration Meta-algorithm for Optimizing Robot Paths using Concurrent Interleaved Sub-Epoch Pods Strobe：一种使用并发交错子纪元 Pod 优化机器人路径的加速元算法 In this paper, we present a meta-algorithm intended to accelerate many existing path optimization algorithms. The central idea of our work is to strategically break up a waypoint path into consecutive groupings called "pods," then optimize over various pods concurrently using parallel processing. Each pod is assigned a color, either blue or red, and the path is divided in such a way that adjacent pods of the same color have an appropriate buffer of the opposite color between them, reducing the risk of interference between concurrent computations. We present a path splitting algorithm to create blue and red pod groupings and detail steps for a meta-algorithm that optimizes over these pods in parallel. We assessed how our method works on a testbed of simulated path optimization scenarios using various optimization tasks and characterize how it scales with additional threads. We also compared our meta-algorithm on these tasks to other parallelization schemes. Our results show that our method more effectively utilizes concurrency compared to the alternatives, both in terms of speed and optimization quality. 在本文中，我们提出了一种元算法，旨在加速许多现有的路径优化算法。我们工作的中心思想是战略性地将路径点路径分解为称为“吊舱”的连续分组，然后使用并行处理同时优化各个吊舱。每个 Pod 都分配有一种颜色（蓝色或红色），并且路径的划分方式使得相同颜色的相邻 Pod 在它们之间具有相反颜色的适当缓冲区，从而降低并发计算之间干扰的风险。我们提出了一种路径分割算法来创建蓝色和红色 Pod 分组，并详细介绍了并行优化这些 Pod 的元算法的步骤。我们使用各种优化任务评估了我们的方法如何在模拟路径优化场景的测试台上工作，并描述了它如何通过附加线程进行扩展。我们还将这些任务的元算法与其他并行化方案进行了比较。我们的结果表明，与其他方法相比，我们的方法在速度和优化质量方面都更有效地利用了并发性。 本文提出一种元算法Strobe，通过将机器人路径分割为蓝红交替的子段（pods）并行优化，提升路径优化效率。 Daniel Rakita,Bilge Mutlu,Michael Gleicher cs.RO

authors_text: Fangfei Lan,Michael Young,Lauren Anderson,Anders Ynnerman,Alexander Bock,Michelle A. Borkin,Angus G. Forbes,Juna A. Kollmeier,Bei Wang
title: Visualization in Astrophysics: Developing New Methods, Discovering Our Universe, and Educating the Earth
title_zh: 天体物理学可视化：开发新方法、发现宇宙并教育地球
abstract: We present a state-of-the-art report on visualization in astrophysics. We survey representative papers from both astrophysics and visualization and provide a taxonomy of existing approaches based on data analysis tasks. The approaches are classified based on five categories: data wrangling, data exploration, feature identification, object reconstruction, as well as education and outreach. Our unique contribution is to combine the diverse viewpoints from both astronomers and visualization experts to identify challenges and opportunities for visualization in astrophysics. The main goal is to provide a reference point to bring modern data analysis and visualization techniques to the rich datasets in astrophysics.
summary: We present a state-of-the-art report on visualization in astrophysics. We survey representative papers from both astrophysics and visualization and provide a taxonomy of existing approaches based on data analysis tasks. The approaches are classified based on five categories: data wrangling, data exploration, feature identification, object reconstruction, as well as education and outreach. Our unique contribution is to combine the diverse viewpoints from both astronomers and visualization experts to identify challenges and opportunities for visualization in astrophysics. The main goal is to provide a reference point to bring modern data analysis and visualization techniques to the rich datasets in astrophysics.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一份关于天体物理学可视化的最先进的报告。我们调查了天体物理学和可视化领域的代表性论文，并根据数据分析任务提供了现有方法的分类。这些方法根据五个类别进行分类：数据整理、数据探索、特征识别、对象重建以及教育和推广。我们的独特贡献是结合天文学家和可视化专家的不同观点，以确定天体物理学可视化的挑战和机遇。主要目标是提供一个参考点，将现代数据分析和可视化技术引入天体物理学的丰富数据集中。

AI.tldr: 综述天体物理中的可视化方法，分类现有技术，并结合天文学家与可视化专家观点，以应对数据挑战
AI.motivation: 应对天体物理数据复杂性，传统方法不足，需跨领域协作推动技术发展
AI.method: 通过文献调研，按数据整理、探索、特征识别、对象重建及教育分类方法，并整合天文学家与可视化专家视角
AI.result: 构建可视化方法分类框架，识别跨领域挑战与机遇，并为未来研究提供方向
AI.conclusion: 可视化对探索宇宙至关重要，需持续跨学科合作以推动技术创新与应用

title: Single-query Path Planning Using Sample-efficient Probability Informed Trees
title_zh: 使用样本有效概率知情树的单查询路径规划
abstract: In this work, we present a novel sampling-based path planning method, called SPRINT. The method finds solutions for high dimensional path planning problems quickly and robustly. Its efficiency comes from minimizing the number of collision check samples. This reduction in sampling relies on heuristics that predict the likelihood that samples will be useful in the search process. Specifically, heuristics (1) prioritize more promising search regions; (2) cull samples from local minima regions; and (3) steer the search away from previously observed collision states. Empirical evaluations show that our method finds shorter or comparable-length solution paths in significantly less time than commonly used methods. We demonstrate that these performance gains can be largely attributed to our approach to achieve sample efficiency.
summary: In this work, we present a novel sampling-based path planning method, called SPRINT. The method finds solutions for high dimensional path planning problems quickly and robustly. Its efficiency comes from minimizing the number of collision check samples. This reduction in sampling relies on heuristics that predict the likelihood that samples will be useful in the search process. Specifically, heuristics (1) prioritize more promising search regions; (2) cull samples from local minima regions; and (3) steer the search away from previously observed collision states. Empirical evaluations show that our method finds shorter or comparable-length solution paths in significantly less time than commonly used methods. We demonstrate that these performance gains can be largely attributed to our approach to achieve sample efficiency.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于采样的路径规划方法，称为 SPRINT。该方法快速、鲁棒地找到高维路径规划问题的解决方案。其效率来自于最大限度地减少碰撞检查样本的数量。采样的减少依赖于预测样本在搜索过程中有用的可能性的启发式方法。具体来说，启发式 (1) 优先考虑更有希望的搜索区域； (2)从局部极小区域中剔除样本； (3) 引导搜索远离先前观察到的碰撞状态。经验评估表明，与常用方法相比，我们的方法在显着更少的时间内找到更短或相当长度的解决方案路径。我们证明，这些性能提升很大程度上归功于我们实现样本效率的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SPRINT的新采样路径规划方法，用于高效解决高维路径规划问题。
AI.motivation: 现有路径规划方法在高维空间中效率不足，需减少碰撞检测样本数量以提升计算效率。
AI.method: 通过启发式策略优化采样：优先搜索有希望的区域、剔除局部最优区域样本、避开已知碰撞状态。
AI.result: 实验表明SPRINT在显著缩短求解时间的同时，找到的路径长度与常用方法相当或更短。
AI.conclusion: 采样效率的提升主要归功于启发式策略对搜索过程的优化，验证了该方法的有效性。

title: An Exploratory Analysis of Multilingual Word-Level Quality Estimation with Cross-Lingual Transformers
title_zh: 使用跨语言转换器进行多语言字级质量估计的探索性分析
comment: Accepted to appear at the ACL-IJCNLP 2021 Main conference
comments: Accepted to appear at the ACL-IJCNLP 2021 Main conference
abstract: Most studies on word-level Quality Estimation (QE) of machine translation focus on language-specific models. The obvious disadvantages of these approaches are the need for labelled data for each language pair and the high cost required to maintain several language-specific models. To overcome these problems, we explore different approaches to multilingual, word-level QE. We show that these QE models perform on par with the current language-specific models. In the cases of zero-shot and few-shot QE, we demonstrate that it is possible to accurately predict word-level quality for any given new language pair from models trained on other language pairs. Our findings suggest that the word-level QE models based on powerful pre-trained transformers that we propose in this paper generalise well across languages, making them more useful in real-world scenarios.
summary: Most studies on word-level Quality Estimation (QE) of machine translation focus on language-specific models. The obvious disadvantages of these approaches are the need for labelled data for each language pair and the high cost required to maintain several language-specific models. To overcome these problems, we explore different approaches to multilingual, word-level QE. We show that these QE models perform on par with the current language-specific models. In the cases of zero-shot and few-shot QE, we demonstrate that it is possible to accurately predict word-level quality for any given new language pair from models trained on other language pairs. Our findings suggest that the word-level QE models based on powerful pre-trained transformers that we propose in this paper generalise well across languages, making them more useful in real-world scenarios.
abstract_zh: 大多数关于机器翻译的词级质量估计（QE）的研究都集中在特定于语言的模型上。这些方法的明显缺点是需要每个语言对的标记数据以及维护多种特定语言模型所需的高成本。为了克服这些问题，我们探索了多语言、单词级 QE 的不同方法。我们证明这些 QE 模型的性能与当前特定语言模型的性能相当。在零样本和少样本 QE 的情况下，我们证明可以通过在其他语言对上训练的模型准确预测任何给定新语言对的单词级质量。我们的研究结果表明，我们在本文中提出的基于强大的预训练变压器的字级 QE 模型可以很好地跨语言推广，使它们在现实场景中更有用。

AI.tldr: 本文探索基于跨语言Transformer的多语言词级机器翻译质量估计方法，旨在减少对语言特定模型的依赖。
AI.motivation: 现有词级质量估计模型需为每个语言对单独训练，存在标注数据需求大和维护成本高的问题。
AI.method: 采用预训练Transformer模型进行跨语言迁移学习，在多种语言对上测试零样本/少样本QE性能。
AI.result: 提出的多语言模型在零样本和少样本场景下表现与语言特定模型相当，证明了跨语言泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 基于强大预训练模型的多语言QE方法能有效跨语言迁移，在实际应用中更具实用价值。

tldr: 本文探索基于跨语言Transformer的多语言词级机器翻译质量估计方法，旨在减少对语言特定模型的依赖。
motivation: 现有词级质量估计模型需为每个语言对单独训练，存在标注数据需求大和维护成本高的问题。
method: 采用预训练Transformer模型进行跨语言迁移学习，在多种语言对上测试零样本/少样本QE性能。
result: 提出的多语言模型在零样本和少样本场景下表现与语言特定模型相当，证明了跨语言泛化能力。
conclusion: 基于强大预训练模型的多语言QE方法能有效跨语言迁移，在实际应用中更具实用价值。
search_text: An Exploratory Analysis of Multilingual Word-Level Quality Estimation with Cross-Lingual Transformers 使用跨语言转换器进行多语言字级质量估计的探索性分析 Most studies on word-level Quality Estimation (QE) of machine translation focus on language-specific models. The obvious disadvantages of these approaches are the need for labelled data for each language pair and the high cost required to maintain several language-specific models. To overcome these problems, we explore different approaches to multilingual, word-level QE. We show that these QE models perform on par with the current language-specific models. In the cases of zero-shot and few-shot QE, we demonstrate that it is possible to accurately predict word-level quality for any given new language pair from models trained on other language pairs. Our findings suggest that the word-level QE models based on powerful pre-trained transformers that we propose in this paper generalise well across languages, making them more useful in real-world scenarios. 大多数关于机器翻译的词级质量估计（QE）的研究都集中在特定于语言的模型上。这些方法的明显缺点是需要每个语言对的标记数据以及维护多种特定语言模型所需的高成本。为了克服这些问题，我们探索了多语言、单词级 QE 的不同方法。我们证明这些 QE 模型的性能与当前特定语言模型的性能相当。在零样本和少样本 QE 的情况下，我们证明可以通过在其他语言对上训练的模型准确预测任何给定新语言对的单词级质量。我们的研究结果表明，我们在本文中提出的基于强大的预训练变压器的字级 QE 模型可以很好地跨语言推广，使它们在现实场景中更有用。 本文探索基于跨语言Transformer的多语言词级机器翻译质量估计方法，旨在减少对语言特定模型的依赖。 Tharindu Ranasinghe,Constantin Orasan,Ruslan Mitkov cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: GANs Can Play Lottery Tickets Too
title_zh: GAN 也可以玩彩票
abstract: Deep generative adversarial networks (GANs) have gained growing popularity in numerous scenarios, while usually suffer from high parameter complexities for resource-constrained real-world applications. However, the compression of GANs has less been explored. A few works show that heuristically applying compression techniques normally leads to unsatisfactory results, due to the notorious training instability of GANs. In parallel, the lottery ticket hypothesis shows prevailing success on discriminative models, in locating sparse matching subnetworks capable of training in isolation to full model performance. In this work, we for the first time study the existence of such trainable matching subnetworks in deep GANs. For a range of GANs, we certainly find matching subnetworks at 67%-74% sparsity. We observe that with or without pruning discriminator has a minor effect on the existence and quality of matching subnetworks, while the initialization weights used in the discriminator play a significant role. We then show the powerful transferability of these subnetworks to unseen tasks. Furthermore, extensive experimental results demonstrate that our found subnetworks substantially outperform previous state-of-the-art GAN compression approaches in both image generation (e.g. SNGAN) and image-to-image translation GANs (e.g. CycleGAN). Codes available at https://github.com/VITA-Group/GAN-LTH.
summary: Deep generative adversarial networks (GANs) have gained growing popularity in numerous scenarios, while usually suffer from high parameter complexities for resource-constrained real-world applications. However, the compression of GANs has less been explored. We observe that with or without pruning discriminator has a minor effect on the existence and quality of matching subnetworks, while the initialization weights used in the discriminator play a significant role. We then show the powerful transferability of these subnetworks to unseen tasks. Furthermore, extensive experimental results demonstrate that our found subnetworks substantially outperform previous state-of-the-art GAN compression approaches in both image generation (e.g. SNGAN) and image-to-image translation GANs (e.g. CycleGAN). Codes available at https://github.com/VITA-Group/GAN-LTH.
abstract_zh: 深度生成对抗网络（GAN）在许多场景中越来越受欢迎，但在资源受限的现实应用中通常会遇到参数复杂性高的问题。然而，GAN 的压缩研究较少。一些研究表明，由于 GAN 众所周知的训练不稳定性，启发式应用压缩技术通常会导致不令人满意的结果。与此同时，彩票假设显示了判别模型在定位能够独立训练到完整模型性能的稀疏匹配子网络方面取得了普遍成功。在这项工作中，我们首次研究了深度 GAN 中此类可训练匹配子网络的存在。对于一系列 GAN，我们当然可以找到稀疏度为 67%-74% 的匹配子网络。我们观察到，有或没有剪枝判别器对匹配子网络的存在和质量影响较小，而判别​​器中使用的初始化权重则起着重要作用。然后，我们展示了这些子网络对未见过的任务的强大可转移性。此外，大量的实验结果表明，我们发现的子网络在图像生成（例如 SNGAN）和图像到图像转换 GAN（例如 CycleGAN）方面远远优于以前最先进的 GAN 压缩方法。代码可在 https://github.com/VITA-Group/GAN-LTH 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在生成对抗网络（GANs）中是否存在可训练的稀疏子网络，并提出了有效的压缩方法。
AI.motivation: GANs在资源受限的实际应用中面临参数复杂度过高的问题，而现有的压缩技术效果不佳，因此需要探索适用于GANs的稀疏子网络。
AI.method: 基于彩票假设，作者首次研究了GANs中是否存在可独立训练且性能与完整模型相当的稀疏子网络，并通过实验验证了这些子网络的可迁移性。
AI.result: 实验表明，在多种GANs中可以找到67%-74%稀疏度的匹配子网络，且这些子网络在图像生成和图像到图像翻译任务中显著优于现有压缩方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次在GANs中验证了彩票假设的可行性，提出的稀疏子网络方法有效提升了GANs的压缩性能和应用潜力。

authors_text: Maayan Shvo,Zhiming Hu,Rodrigo Toro Icarte,Iqbal Mohomed,Allan Jepson,Sheila A. McIlraith
title: AppBuddy: Learning to Accomplish Tasks in Mobile Apps via Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: AppBuddy：通过强化学习学习完成移动应用程序中的任务
abstract: Human beings, even small children, quickly become adept at figuring out how to use applications on their mobile devices. Learning to use a new app is often achieved via trial-and-error, accelerated by transfer of knowledge from past experiences with like apps. The prospect of building a smarter smartphone - one that can learn how to achieve tasks using mobile apps - is tantalizing. In this paper we explore the use of Reinforcement Learning (RL) with the goal of advancing this aspiration. We introduce an RL-based framework for learning to accomplish tasks in mobile apps. RL agents are provided with states derived from the underlying representation of on-screen elements, and rewards that are based on progress made in the task. Agents can interact with screen elements by tapping or typing. Our experimental results, over a number of mobile apps, show that RL agents can learn to accomplish multi-step tasks, as well as achieve modest generalization across different apps. More generally, we develop a platform which addresses several engineering challenges to enable an effective RL training environment. Our AppBuddy platform is compatible with OpenAI Gym and includes a suite of mobile apps and benchmark tasks that supports a diversity of RL research in the mobile app setting.
summary: Human beings, even small children, quickly become adept at figuring out how to use applications on their mobile devices. Learning to use a new app is often achieved via trial-and-error, accelerated by transfer of knowledge from past experiences with like apps. The prospect of building a smarter smartphone - one that can learn how to achieve tasks using mobile apps - is tantalizing. In this paper we explore the use of Reinforcement Learning (RL) with the goal of advancing this aspiration. We introduce an RL-based framework for learning to accomplish tasks in mobile apps. RL agents are provided with states derived from the underlying representation of on-screen elements, and rewards that are based on progress made in the task. Agents can interact with screen elements by tapping or typing. Our experimental results, over a number of mobile apps, show that RL agents can learn to accomplish multi-step tasks, as well as achieve modest generalization across different apps. More generally, we develop a platform which addresses several engineering challenges to enable an effective RL training environment. Our AppBuddy platform is compatible with OpenAI Gym and includes a suite of mobile apps and benchmark tasks that supports a diversity of RL research in the mobile app setting.
abstract_zh: 人类，甚至是小孩子，很快就能熟练掌握如何在移动设备上使用应用程序。学习使用新应用程序通常是通过反复试验来实现的，并通过从过去使用类似应用程序的经验中转移知识来加速。打造一款更智能的智能手机（能够学习如何使用移动应用程序完成任务）的前景非常诱人。在本文中，我们探索强化学习（RL）的使用，以实现这一愿望。我们引入了一个基于强化学习的框架，用于学习如何完成移动应用程序中的任务。强化学习代理获得的状态源自屏幕元素的底层表示，以及基于任务进展的奖励。客服人员可以通过点击或打字与屏幕元素进行交互。我们在许多移动应用程序上的实验结果表明，强化学习代理可以学习完成多步骤任务，并在不同的应用程序之间实现适度的泛化。更一般地说，我们开发了一个平台，可以解决多个工程挑战，以实现有效的强化学习训练环境。我们的 AppBuddy 平台与 OpenAI Gym 兼容，并包含一套移动应用程序和基准任务，支持移动应用程序设置中的各种 RL 研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个基于强化学习的框架AppBuddy，使智能体能够学习在移动应用中完成多步骤任务。
AI.motivation: 人类能通过试错和知识迁移快速掌握新应用，但现有设备缺乏自主学习能力，需构建智能手机完成任务。
AI.method: 设计RL框架，利用屏幕元素状态和任务进度奖励，通过点击/输入交互，并开发兼容OpenAI Gym的AppBuddy平台。
AI.result: 实验表明智能体可完成多步骤任务并在不同应用间泛化，平台解决了RL训练环境的工程挑战。
AI.conclusion: AppBuddy验证了RL在移动应用任务学习中的可行性，为相关研究提供了标准化平台和基准测试。

title: Clustering-friendly Representation Learning via Instance Discrimination and Feature Decorrelation
title_zh: 通过实例区分和特征去相关进行聚类友好的表示学习
comment: 15 pages, ICLR2021
comments: 15 pages, ICLR2021
abstract: Clustering is one of the most fundamental tasks in machine learning. Recently, deep clustering has become a major trend in clustering techniques. Representation learning often plays an important role in the effectiveness of deep clustering, and thus can be a principal cause of performance degradation. In this paper, we propose a clustering-friendly representation learning method using instance discrimination and feature decorrelation. Our deep-learning-based representation learning method is motivated by the properties of classical spectral clustering. Instance discrimination learns similarities among data and feature decorrelation removes redundant correlation among features. We utilize an instance discrimination method in which learning individual instance classes leads to learning similarity among instances. Through detailed experiments and examination, we show that the approach can be adapted to learning a latent space for clustering. We design novel softmax-formulated decorrelation constraints for learning. In evaluations of image clustering using CIFAR-10 and ImageNet-10, our method achieves accuracy of 81.5% and 95.4%, respectively. We also show that the softmax-formulated constraints are compatible with various neural networks.

In evaluations of image clustering using CIFAR-10 and ImageNet-10, our method achieves accuracy of 81.5% and 95.4%, respectively. abstract_zh: 聚类是机器学习中最基本的任务之一。近年来，深度聚类已成为聚类技术的主要趋势。表示学习通常在深度聚类的有效性中发挥着重要作用，因此可能是性能下降的主要原因。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用实例辨别和特征去相关的聚类友好的表示学习方法。我们基于深度学习的表示学习方法是受经典谱聚类特性的启发。实例辨别学习数据之间的相似性，特征去相关消除特征之间的冗余相关性。我们利用实例区分方法，通过学习单个实例类来学习实例之间的相似性。通过详细的实验和检查，我们表明该方法可以适用于学习聚类的潜在空间。我们设计了新颖的 softmax 形式的去相关约束用于学习。在使用 CIFAR-10 和 ImageNet-10 进行图像聚类评估时，我们的方法分别实现了 81.5% 和 95.4% 的准确率。我们还表明，softmax 制定的约束与各种神经网络兼容。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合实例辨别与特征解相关的聚类友好表示学习方法，以提升深度聚类性能。
AI.motivation: 深度聚类中表示学习的有效性直接影响聚类效果，而现有方法存在特征冗余和相似性学习不足的问题。
AI.method: 融合实例辨别（学习实例间相似性）与特征解相关（通过softmax约束消除特征冗余），基于谱聚类理论设计新型约束条件。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10和ImageNet-10数据集上分别达到81.5%和95.4%的聚类准确率，且兼容多种神经网络架构。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过解耦特征相关性并强化实例区分度，有效提升了聚类表示学习性能，具有广泛适用性。

title: Multidimensional Included and Excluded Sums
title_zh: 多维包含和排除总和
comment: 18 pages, short version to appear in ACDA 2021
comments: 18 pages, short version to appear in ACDA 2021
abstract: This paper presents algorithms for the included-sums and excluded-sums problems used by scientific computing applications such as the fast multipole method. These problems are defined in terms of a $d$-dimensional array of $N$ elements and a binary associative operator~$\oplus$ on the elements. The included-sum problem requires that the elements within overlapping boxes cornered at each element within the array be reduced using $\oplus$. The excluded-sum problem reduces the elements outside each box. The weak versions of these problems assume that the operator $\oplus$ has an inverse $\ominus$, whereas the strong versions do not require this assumption. In addition to studying existing algorithms to solve these problems, we introduce three new algorithms. The bidirectional box-sum (BDBS) algorithm solves the strong included-sums problem in $Θ(d N)$ time, asymptotically beating the classical summed-area table (SAT) algorithm, which runs in $Θ(2^d N)$ and which only solves the weak version of the problem. Empirically, the BDBS algorithm outperforms the SAT algorithm in higher dimensions by up to $17.1\times$. The \defn{box-complement} algorithm can solve the strong excluded-sums problem in $Θ(d N)$ time, asymptotically beating the state-of-the-art corners algorithm by Demaine et al., which runs in $Ω(2^d N)$ time. In 3 dimensions the box-complement algorithm empirically outperforms the corners algorithm by about $1.4\times$ given similar amounts of space. The weak excluded-sums problem can be solved in $Θ(d N)$ time by the bidirectional box-sum complement (BDBSC) algorithm, which is a trivial extension of the BDBS algorithm. Given an operator inverse $\ominus$, BDBSC can beat box-complement by up to a factor of $4$.

In addition to studying existing algorithms to solve these problems, we introduce three new algorithms. The bidirectional box-sum (BDBS) algorithm solves the strong included-sums problem in $Θ(d N)$ time, asymptotically beating the classical summed-area table (SAT) algorithm, which runs in $Θ(2^d N)$ and which only solves the weak version of the problem. Empirically, the BDBS algorithm outperforms the SAT algorithm in higher dimensions by up to $17.1\times$. The \defn{box-complement} algorithm can solve the strong excluded-sums problem in $Θ(d N)$ time, asymptotically beating the state-of-the-art corners algorithm by Demaine et al., which runs in $Ω(2^d N)$ time. In 3 dimensions the box-complement algorithm empirically outperforms the corners algorithm by about $1.4\times$ given similar amounts of space. Given an operator inverse $\ominus$, BDBSC can beat box-complement by up to a factor of $4$.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了科学计算应用（例如快速多极子方法）所使用的包含和和排除和问题的算法。这些问题是根据 $N$ 元素的 $d$ 维数组和元素上的二元关联运算符 ~$\oplus$ 来定义的。包含和问题要求使用 $\oplus$ 减少数组中每个元素处的重叠框中的元素。排除和问题减少了每个盒子之外的元素。这些问题的弱版本假设运算符 $\oplus$ 具有逆 $\ominus$，而强版本则不需要此假设。除了研究现有算法来解决这些问题之外，我们还引入了三种新算法。双向盒和 (BDBS) 算法在 $θ(d N)$ 时间内解决了强包含和问题，渐近击败了经典求和面积表 (SAT) 算法，该算法在 $θ(2^d N)$ 时间内运行，并且仅解决了该问题的弱版本。根据经验，BDBS 算法在更高维度上的性能优于 SAT 算法高达 17.1\times$。 \defn{box-complement} 算法可以在 $θ(d N)$ 时间内解决强排除和问题，渐近击败 Demaine 等人提出的最先进的角点算法，该算法在 $Ω(2^d N)$ 时间内运行。在 3 维空间中，在空间量相似的情况下，框补算法根据经验比角算法高出约 $1.4\times$。弱排除和问题可以通过双向盒补 (BDBSC) 算法在 $θ(d N)$ 时间内解决，该算法是 BDBS 算法的简单扩展。给定算子逆 $\ominus$，BDBSC 可以击败盒补最多 $4$ 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出三种新算法解决多维数组的包含和与排除和问题，提升科学计算中的计算效率。
AI.motivation: 传统算法在处理高维数据时存在时间复杂度高、效率低的问题，需更优解决方案以满足科学计算需求。
AI.method: 设计了双向盒和算法(BDBS)、盒补集算法(box-complement)及双向盒和补集算法(BDBSC)，分别针对强/弱包含和与排除和问题。
AI.result: BDBS时间复杂度Θ(dN)优于经典SAT算法；box-complement在3D中实测快1.4倍；BDBSC利用逆运算可比box-complement快4倍。
AI.conclusion: 新算法在理论复杂度和实际性能上均优于现有方法，尤其适用于高维科学计算场景。

title: Effect of Pre-Training Scale on Intra- and Inter-Domain Full and Few-Shot Transfer Learning for Natural and Medical X-Ray Chest Images
title_zh: 预训练规模对自然和医学 X 射线胸部图像的域内和域间全镜头和少镜头迁移学习的影响
comment: Short version published in MedNeurIPS 2021. Long version published in IJCNN 2022. Code: https://github.com/SLAMPAI/large-scale-pretraining-transfer
comments: Short version published in MedNeurIPS 2021. Long version published in IJCNN 2022. Code: https://github.com/SLAMPAI/large-scale-pretraining-transfer
abstract: Increasing model, data and compute budget scale in the pre-training has been shown to strongly improve model generalization and transfer learning in vast line of work done in language modeling and natural image recognition. However, most studies on the positive effect of larger scale were done in scope of in-domain setting, with source and target data being in close proximity. To study effect of larger scale for both in-domain and out-of-domain setting when performing full and few-shot transfer, we combine here for the first time large, openly available medical X-Ray chest imaging datasets to reach a scale for medical imaging domain comparable to ImageNet-1k, routinely used for pre-training in natural image domain. We then conduct supervised pre-training, while varying network size and source data scale and domain, being either large natural (ImageNet-1k/21k) or large medical chest X-Ray datasets, and transfer pre-trained models to different natural or medical targets. We observe strong improvement due to larger pre-training scale for intra-domain natural-natural and medical-medical transfer. For inter-domain natural-medical transfer, we find improvements due to larger pre-training scale on larger X-Ray targets in full shot regime, while for smaller targets and for few-shot regime the improvement is not visible. Remarkably, large networks pre-trained on very large natural ImageNet-21k are as good or better than networks pre-trained on largest available medical X-Ray data when performing transfer to large X-Ray targets. We conclude that substantially increasing model and generic, medical domain-agnostic natural image source data scale in the pre-training can enable high quality out-of-domain transfer to medical domain specific targets, removing dependency on large medical domain-specific source data often not available in the practice.
summary: Increasing model, data and compute budget scale in the pre-training has been shown to strongly improve model generalization and transfer learning in vast line of work done in language modeling and natural image recognition. However, most studies on the positive effect of larger scale were done in scope of in-domain setting, with source and target data being in close proximity. To study effect of larger scale for both in-domain and out-of-domain setting when performing full and few-shot transfer, we combine here for the first time large, openly available medical X-Ray chest imaging datasets to reach a scale for medical imaging domain comparable to ImageNet-1k, routinely used for pre-training in natural image domain. We then conduct supervised pre-training, while varying network size and source data scale and domain, being either large natural (ImageNet-1k/21k) or large medical chest X-Ray datasets, and transfer pre-trained models to different natural or medical targets. We observe strong improvement due to larger pre-training scale for intra-domain natural-natural and medical-medical transfer. For inter-domain natural-medical transfer, we find improvements due to larger pre-training scale on larger X-Ray targets in full shot regime, while for smaller targets and for few-shot regime the improvement is not visible. Remarkably, large networks pre-trained on very large natural ImageNet-21k are as good or better than networks pre-trained on largest available medical X-Ray data when performing transfer to large X-Ray targets. We conclude that substantially increasing model and generic, medical domain-agnostic natural image source data scale in the pre-training can enable high quality out-of-domain transfer to medical domain specific targets, removing dependency on large medical domain-specific source data often not available in the practice.
abstract_zh: 事实证明，在语言建模和自然图像识别的大量工作中，增加预训练中的模型、数据和计算预算规模可以极大地提高模型泛化和迁移学习。然而，大多数关于大规模的积极影响的研究都是在域内设置的范围内进行的，源数据和目标数据非常接近。为了研究在执行完整和少数镜头传输时更大规模对域内和域外设置的影响，我们在这里首次结合大型、公开可用的医学 X 射线胸部成像数据集，以达到与 ImageNet-1k 相当的医学成像领域规模，通常用于自然图像领域的预训练。然后，我们进行有监督的预训练，同时改变网络大小和源数据规模和域，即大型自然 (ImageNet-1k/21k) 或大型医疗胸部 X 射线数据集，并将预训练模型转移到不同的自然或医疗目标。我们观察到由于域内自然-自然和医学-医学转移的预训练规模更大，取得了显着的进步。对于域间自然医学转移，我们发现由于在全射模式下对较大的 X 射线目标进行了更大的预训练规模而得到了改进，而对于较小的目标和少射模式，改进并不明显。值得注意的是，在执行大型 X 射线目标传输时，在非常大的自然 ImageNet-21k 上预训练的大型网络与在最大可用医学 X 射线数据上预训练的网络一样好甚至更好。我们的结论是，在预训练中大幅增加模型和通用的、与医学领域无关的自然图像源数据规模可以实现向医学领域特定目标的高质量域外传输，从而消除对实践中通常不可用的大型医学领域特定源数据的依赖。

AI.tldr: 研究预训练规模对自然和医学X光胸片图像领域内及跨领域迁移学习的影响。
AI.motivation: 尽管大规模预训练提升模型泛化能力已被验证，但现有研究多聚焦领域内迁移，跨领域（如自然图像到医学图像）迁移效果及数据规模影响尚不明确。
AI.method: 整合大规模医学X光数据集与自然图像数据集（如ImageNet-1k/21k），通过调整网络规模与预训练数据域（自然或医学），测试其在自然或医学目标域的全样本与少样本迁移性能。
AI.result: 领域内迁移中，大规模预训练显著提升性能；跨领域迁移中，仅在大型医学目标的全样本任务中观察到提升，少样本任务无明显效果。ImageNet-21k预训练模型在大型医学目标上表现优于医学数据预训练模型。
AI.conclusion: 扩大自然图像预训练规模可有效实现跨领域医学迁移，减少对稀缺医学数据的依赖。

search_text: Effect of Pre-Training Scale on Intra- and Inter-Domain Full and Few-Shot Transfer Learning for Natural and Medical X-Ray Chest Images 预训练规模对自然和医学 X 射线胸部图像的域内和域间全镜头和少镜头迁移学习的影响 Increasing model, data and compute budget scale in the pre-training has been shown to strongly improve model generalization and transfer learning in vast line of work done in language modeling and natural image recognition. However, most studies on the positive effect of larger scale were done in scope of in-domain setting, with source and target data being in close proximity. To study effect of larger scale for both in-domain and out-of-domain setting when performing full and few-shot transfer, we combine here for the first time large, openly available medical X-Ray chest imaging datasets to reach a scale for medical imaging domain comparable to ImageNet-1k, routinely used for pre-training in natural image domain. We then conduct supervised pre-training, while varying network size and source data scale and domain, being either large natural (ImageNet-1k/21k) or large medical chest X-Ray datasets, and transfer pre-trained models to different natural or medical targets. We observe strong improvement due to larger pre-training scale for intra-domain natural-natural and medical-medical transfer. For inter-domain natural-medical transfer, we find improvements due to larger pre-training scale on larger X-Ray targets in full shot regime, while for smaller targets and for few-shot regime the improvement is not visible. Remarkably, large networks pre-trained on very large natural ImageNet-21k are as good or better than networks pre-trained on largest available medical X-Ray data when performing transfer to large X-Ray targets. We conclude that substantially increasing model and generic, medical domain-agnostic natural image source data scale in the pre-training can enable high quality out-of-domain transfer to medical domain specific targets, removing dependency on large medical domain-specific source data often not available in the practice. 事实证明，在语言建模和自然图像识别的大量工作中，增加预训练中的模型、数据和计算预算规模可以极大地提高模型泛化和迁移学习。然而，大多数关于大规模的积极影响的研究都是在域内设置的范围内进行的，源数据和目标数据非常接近。为了研究在执行完整和少数镜头传输时更大规模对域内和域外设置的影响，我们在这里首次结合大型、公开可用的医学 X 射线胸部成像数据集，以达到与 ImageNet-1k 相当的医学成像领域规模，通常用于自然图像领域的预训练。然后，我们进行有监督的预训练，同时改变网络大小和源数据规模和域，即大型自然 (ImageNet-1k/21k) 或大型医疗胸部 X 射线数据集，并将预训练模型转移到不同的自然或医疗目标。我们观察到由于域内自然-自然和医学-医学转移的预训练规模更大，取得了显着的进步。对于域间自然医学转移，我们发现由于在全射模式下对较大的 X 射线目标进行了更大的预训练规模而得到了改进，而对于较小的目标和少射模式，改进并不明显。值得注意的是，在执行大型 X 射线目标传输时，在非常大的自然 ImageNet-21k 上预训练的大型网络与在最大可用医学 X 射线数据上预训练的网络一样好甚至更好。我们的结论是，在预训练中大幅增加模型和通用的、与医学领域无关的自然图像源数据规模可以实现向医学领域特定目标的高质量域外传输，从而消除对实践中通常不可用的大型医学领域特定源数据的依赖。 研究预训练规模对自然和医学X光胸片图像领域内及跨领域迁移学习的影响。 Mehdi Cherti,Jenia Jitsev cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Anna K. Yanchenko,Mohammadreza Soltani,Robert J. Ravier,Sayan Mukherjee,Vahid Tarokh
title: A Methodology for Exploring Deep Convolutional Features in Relation to Hand-Crafted Features with an Application to Music Audio Modeling
title_zh: 探索与手工特征相关的深度卷积特征的方法及其在音乐音频建模中的应用
comment: Code available at https://github.com/aky4wn/convolutions-for-music-audio
comments: Code available at https://github.com/aky4wn/convolutions-for-music-audio
abstract: Understanding the features learned by deep models is important from a model trust perspective, especially as deep systems are deployed in the real world. Most recent approaches for deep feature understanding or model explanation focus on highlighting input data features that are relevant for classification decisions. In this work, we instead take the perspective of relating deep features to well-studied, hand-crafted features that are meaningful for the application of interest. We propose a methodology and set of systematic experiments for exploring deep features in this setting, where input feature importance approaches for deep feature understanding do not apply. Our experiments focus on understanding which hand-crafted and deep features are useful for the classification task of interest, how robust these features are for related tasks and how similar the deep features are to the meaningful hand-crafted features. Our proposed method is general to many application areas and we demonstrate its utility on orchestral music audio data.
summary: Understanding the features learned by deep models is important from a model trust perspective, especially as deep systems are deployed in the real world. Most recent approaches for deep feature understanding or model explanation focus on highlighting input data features that are relevant for classification decisions. In this work, we instead take the perspective of relating deep features to well-studied, hand-crafted features that are meaningful for the application of interest. We propose a methodology and set of systematic experiments for exploring deep features in this setting, where input feature importance approaches for deep feature understanding do not apply. Our experiments focus on understanding which hand-crafted and deep features are useful for the classification task of interest, how robust these features are for related tasks and how similar the deep features are to the meaningful hand-crafted features. Our proposed method is general to many application areas and we demonstrate its utility on orchestral music audio data.
abstract_zh: 从模型信任的角度来看，理解深度模型学习的特征非常重要，特别是当深度系统部署在现实世界中时。最新的深度特征理解或模型解释方法侧重于突出与分类决策相关的输入数据特征。在这项工作中，我们采取的观点是，将深层特征与经过充分研究、手工制作的特征联系起来，这些特征对感兴趣的应用程序有意义。我们提出了一种方法和一组系统实验来探索这种情况下的深层特征，其中用于深层特征理解的输入特征重要性方法不适用。我们的实验重点是了解哪些手工制作的深度特征对于感兴趣的分类任务有用，这些特征对于相关任务的鲁棒性如何，以及深度特征与有意义的手工制作的特征有多相似。我们提出的方法适用于许多应用领域，并且我们展示了它在管弦乐音频数据上的实用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种方法，通过将深度卷积特征与手工设计特征进行关联，探索其在音乐音频分类任务中的应用。
AI.motivation: 现有深度模型解释方法多关注输入数据特征的重要性，而忽视了与领域内已有手工特征的关联性，限制了模型可解释性与实际应用的结合。
AI.method: 设计系统性实验框架，比较深度特征与手工特征在分类任务中的效用、跨任务鲁棒性及相似性，适用于多领域并应用于音乐音频数据验证。
AI.result: 识别出对分类任务有效的特征组合，量化特征鲁棒性，并发现深度特征与手工特征在音乐音频建模中的相似性与差异性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为深度模型与领域知识结合提供通用框架，有助于提升模型可解释性及音频分类等任务的性能优化。

title: 3D map creation using crowdsourced GNSS data
title_zh: 使用众包 GNSS 数据创建 3D 地图
comment: 25 pages with 11 figures
comments: 25 pages with 11 figures
abstract: 3D maps are increasingly useful for many applications such as drone navigation, emergency services, and urban planning. However, creating 3D maps and keeping them up-to-date using existing technologies, such as laser scanners, is expensive. This paper proposes and implements a novel approach to generate 2.5D (otherwise known as 3D level-of-detail (LOD) 1) maps for free using Global Navigation Satellite Systems (GNSS) signals, which are globally available and are blocked only by obstacles between the satellites and the receivers. This enables us to find the patterns of GNSS signal availability and create 3D maps. The paper applies algorithms to GNSS signal strength patterns based on a boot-strapped technique that iteratively trains the signal classifiers while generating the map. Results of the proposed technique demonstrate the ability to create 3D maps using automatically processed GNSS data. The results show that the third dimension, i.e. height of the buildings, can be estimated with below 5 metre accuracy, which is the benchmark recommended by the CityGML standard.
summary: 3D maps are increasingly useful for many applications such as drone navigation, emergency services, and urban planning. However, creating 3D maps and keeping them up-to-date using existing technologies, such as laser scanners, is expensive. This paper proposes and implements a novel approach to generate 2.5D (otherwise known as 3D level-of-detail (LOD) 1) maps for free using Global Navigation Satellite Systems (GNSS) signals, which are globally available and are blocked only by obstacles between the satellites and the receivers. This enables us to find the patterns of GNSS signal availability and create 3D maps. The paper applies algorithms to GNSS signal strength patterns based on a boot-strapped technique that iteratively trains the signal classifiers while generating the map. Results of the proposed technique demonstrate the ability to create 3D maps using automatically processed GNSS data. The results show that the third dimension, i.e. height of the buildings, can be estimated with below 5 metre accuracy, which is the benchmark recommended by the CityGML standard.
abstract_zh: 3D 地图对于无人机导航、紧急服务和城市规划等许多应用越来越有用。然而，使用激光扫描仪等现有技术创建 3D 地图并使其保持最新状态的成本很高。本文提出并实现了一种使用全球导航卫星系统 (GNSS) 信号免费生成 2.5D（也称为 3D 细节级别 (LOD)1）地图的新颖方法，这些信号在全球范围内可用，并且仅被卫星和接收器之间的障碍物阻挡。这使我们能够找到 GNSS 信号可用性的模式并创建 3D 地图。该论文基于自举技术将算法应用于 GNSS 信号强度模式，该技术在生成地图的同时迭代训练信号分类器。所提出技术的结果证明了使用自动处理的 GNSS 数据创建 3D 地图的能力。结果表明，第三维，即建筑物的高度，可以以5米以下的精度进行估算，这是CityGML标准推荐的基准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用众包GNSS数据自动生成2.5D地图的新方法。
AI.motivation: 传统3D地图制作技术（如激光扫描）成本高昂，而GNSS信号作为全球可获取的资源，可提供低成本的替代方案。
AI.method: 基于GNSS信号强度模式，采用自举技术迭代训练信号分类器，通过分析信号遮挡规律生成三维地图。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法可实现建筑物高度估计误差低于5米，符合CityGML标准的基准要求。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了利用GNSS数据自动生成高精度3D地图的可行性，为低成本地图更新提供了新路径。

search_text: 3D map creation using crowdsourced GNSS data 使用众包 GNSS 数据创建 3D 地图 3D maps are increasingly useful for many applications such as drone navigation, emergency services, and urban planning. However, creating 3D maps and keeping them up-to-date using existing technologies, such as laser scanners, is expensive. This paper proposes and implements a novel approach to generate 2.5D (otherwise known as 3D level-of-detail (LOD) 1) maps for free using Global Navigation Satellite Systems (GNSS) signals, which are globally available and are blocked only by obstacles between the satellites and the receivers. This enables us to find the patterns of GNSS signal availability and create 3D maps. The paper applies algorithms to GNSS signal strength patterns based on a boot-strapped technique that iteratively trains the signal classifiers while generating the map. Results of the proposed technique demonstrate the ability to create 3D maps using automatically processed GNSS data. The results show that the third dimension, i.e. height of the buildings, can be estimated with below 5 metre accuracy, which is the benchmark recommended by the CityGML standard. 3D 地图对于无人机导航、紧急服务和城市规划等许多应用越来越有用。然而，使用激光扫描仪等现有技术创建 3D 地图并使其保持最新状态的成本很高。本文提出并实现了一种使用全球导航卫星系统 (GNSS) 信号免费生成 2.5D（也称为 3D 细节级别 (LOD)1）地图的新颖方法，这些信号在全球范围内可用，并且仅被卫星和接收器之间的障碍物阻挡。这使我们能够找到 GNSS 信号可用性的模式并创建 3D 地图。该论文基于自举技术将算法应用于 GNSS 信号强度模式，该技术在生成地图的同时迭代训练信号分类器。所提出技术的结果证明了使用自动处理的 GNSS 数据创建 3D 地图的能力。结果表明，第三维，即建筑物的高度，可以以5米以下的精度进行估算，这是CityGML标准推荐的基准。 本文提出了一种利用众包GNSS数据自动生成2.5D地图的新方法。 Terence Lines,Ana Basiri cs.RO,cs.CV,eess.SP

title: Optimal Algorithms for Multiwinner Elections and the Chamberlin-Courant Rule
title_zh: 多赢者选举的最优算法和张伯伦-库朗规则
comment: Accepted by the Twenty-Second ACM Conference on Economics and Computation (EC 2021)
comments: Accepted by the Twenty-Second ACM Conference on Economics and Computation (EC 2021)
abstract: We consider the algorithmic question of choosing a subset of candidates of a given size $k$ from a set of $m$ candidates, with knowledge of voters' ordinal rankings over all candidates. We consider the well-known and classic scoring rule for achieving diverse representation: the Chamberlin-Courant (CC) or $1$-Borda rule, where the score of a committee is the average over the voters, of the rank of the best candidate in the committee for that voter; and its generalization to the average of the top $s$ best candidates, called the $s$-Borda rule. Our first result is an improved analysis of the natural and well-studied greedy heuristic. We show that greedy achieves a $\left(1 - \frac{2}{k+1}\right)$-approximation to the maximization (or satisfaction) version of CC rule, and a $\left(1 - \frac{2s}{k+1}\right)$-approximation to the $s$-Borda score. Our result improves on the best known approximation algorithm for this problem. We show that these bounds are almost tight. For the dissatisfaction (or minimization) version of the problem, we show that the score of $\frac{m+1}{k+1}$ can be viewed as an optimal benchmark for the CC rule, as it is essentially the best achievable score of any polynomial-time algorithm even when the optimal score is a polynomial factor smaller (under standard computational complexity assumptions). We show that another well-studied algorithm for this problem, called the Banzhaf rule, attains this benchmark. We finally show that for the $s$-Borda rule, when the optimal value is small, these algorithms can be improved by a factor of $\tilde Ω(\sqrt{s})$ via LP rounding. Our upper and lower bounds are a significant improvement over previous results, and taken together, not only enable us to perform a finer comparison of greedy algorithms for these problems, but also provide analytic justification for using such algorithms in practice.
